# pen-todo

HAXcms is a file-based CMS: authored pages and metadata are stored as portable files, not locked into a database-only workflow.
The canonical site structure is `site.json`, represented in JSON Outline Schema (`id`, `parent`, `order`, `slug`, `location`, and `metadata`).
Use HAX CLI and ecosystem tooling to maintain human-authored content while keeping machine-readable outputs synchronized.
Managed files (feeds, search indexes, manifests, and this `llms.txt`) are generated artifacts and should be rebuilt by tooling.

## Core resources
- [site.json](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/site.json): Canonical site manifest and navigation tree in JSON Outline Schema format.
- [llms.txt](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/llms.txt): LLM-oriented guide to this site and its machine-readable resources.

## Pages
- [Syllabus](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-course-syllabus/index.md)
- [Lesson 1](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-lesson-1/index.md)
- [Lesson 1: Introduction](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-lesson-1-intro/index.md)
- [Lesson 1: Content](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-lesson-1-content/index.md)
- [Lesson 1: Conclusion](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/pages/item-lesson-1-conclusion/index.md)

## Optional
- [Search index](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/lunrSearchIndex.json): Lunr corpus for quick full-text retrieval.
- [RSS feed](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/rss.xml): Site updates in RSS format.
- [Atom feed](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/atom.xml): Site updates in Atom format.
- [Sitemap](https://localhost/sites/pen-todo/sitemap.xml): URL-level discovery map for the published site.
